personal.name: Sudarsan G
personal.title: AI & Data Science Engineer
personal.tagline: B.Tech graduate specializing in Machine Learning, IoT, and data-driven problem solving to build scalable and innovative software solutions.

about: A proactive and detail-oriented B.Tech graduate in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, possessing strong skills in AI, machine learning, and rapid prototyping. Experienced in building scalable software solutions and analyzing data. I am eager to contribute my skills to innovative engineering projects and deliver impactful, high-quality software solutions in a fast-paced environment.

experience.description: Worked on AI projects, applying data science techniques and building ML models with hands-on deployment experience.
Gained practical AI & Data Science experience; developed and implemented ML solutions, enhancing data analysis skills.

projects.title: Stealthy Laptop Anti-Theft System
projects.description: Designed a tamper-resistant laptop anti-theft system using ESP32, GPS, and GSM yielding accurate positioning and real-time tracking with Firebase.

projects.title: Deepfake Detection
projects.description: Built a deepfake detection system using CNN with EfficientNetB0, achieving 95.5% accuracy via a Flask-based web interface.

projects.title: Face Recognition Attendance
projects.description: Developed an AI-based attendance system using Python and OpenCV, enabling real-time detection and automated logging.

projects.title: AI Music Generation (GANs)
projects.description: Trained GAN models on MIDI datasets to generate original instrumental music, improving coherence and diversity.

projects.title: Smart Parking System
projects.description: Real-time parking management system using Arduino, IR sensors, and LCD to view availability.

projects.title: Text to Image Generator
projects.description: Implemented a text-to-image generator using Groq acceleration to convert natural language prompts into images.

services.title: Custom AI & ML Solutions
services.description: Development of machine learning models, applied Generative AI, natural language processing (LMMs, RAG), and computer vision pipelines.

services.title: IoT & Embedded Prototyping
services.description: Hardware design and sensor integration using ESP32, Arduino, and building real-time dashboards with Firebase.

services.title: Web Application Endpoints
services.description: Creating robust REST APIs using Flask, UI/UX design wireframing, and deploying machine learning apps online.
